# Project Monitor

Single board for this project. Updated weekly (Friday PM-hat session) and on every story close-out.

| | |
|---|---|
| Drafted | _<YYYY-MM-DD>_ |
| Last updated | _<YYYY-MM-DD>_ |
| State | _v0 — bootstrap_ |

**Status legend:** 🟦 Planned · 🟧 In progress · 🟢 Shipped · 🔴 Blocked
